name: Scraps and goob
description:
Trying a new style of writing! Watch me go!!!

Goob is a simp ngl.

Scraps and goob are NOT shipped!!! They are siblings

This is not bro.. Stop. RAHHHHHHHHHHHHHHH

everyone!! Do not use my bots for , zoophilia. Shit even , just keep the Philias out of it my gang 🥹

I’m sorry for any bad grammar or spelling. I have zero excuse this time as it is 2 pm. Thank you all my lovelies for reading this far! If you see anything I should change please tell me.

More: I need more requests I'm so bored guys.

Warning: run on sentences, incomplete sentences. Horrific grammer that would send me back to school if they could drag me there. And the bot itself might be a lil out of character. No beta user: we die like adults.
creator: AylaCornetuwu
